channel.title: Emil Andersson — Posts
channel.description: Web development, 3D art, game dev, and creative coding by Emil Andersson.

item.title: Building a Portfolio with Astro 5
item.description: How I built this portfolio site using Astro 5, Tailwind CSS, and the Content Layer — all deployed to shared hosting.

item.title: My 3D Art Workflow
item.description: A look at my 3D art pipeline — from Blender modeling to final renders, and how I use these skills in game development.
